must_haves: Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
Built something real with an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
Ability to build front-ends that are visually appealing
nice_to_haves: Experience with retail or e-commerce domain
Knowledge of clienteling or CRM tools
hidden_expectations: Ability to work directly with the CEO's office and influence strategy
Comfortable in a design-driven, brand-focused culture
Self-starter who can own projects end-to-end
Strong aesthetic sense and attention to visual detail
Ability to communicate with non-technical stakeholders (designers, store teams)
day_one_deliverables: Assess current tech stack and data infrastructure
Identify quick wins for AI integration in customer communication
Propose a roadmap for replacing Microsoft BI with conversational intelligence
Start building a prototype for store clienteling tool
disqualifiers: No engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
No hands-on experience with LLM APIs
No proficiency in Python or NodeJS
